creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Comment “BREAKERS” for the hotel link 👇

 I’m honestly saving up to stay here one day because it isn’t cheap, but it’s definitely on my 2026 bucket list.

The Breakers Palm Beach is a historic, Italian Renaissance-style oceanfront resort on 140 acres at 1 South County Road, Palm Beach, FL 33480 — and it’s been wowing visitors since the late 1890s. It was originally built by railroad magnate Henry Flagler to be the ultimate seaside getaway and has stood the test of time (rebuilt after fires in the early 1900s) to become one of Florida’s most legendary hotels. 

On property you’ll find:
• Private beach access & four oceanfront pools
• World-class spa & fitness facilities
• 10+ restaurants, from casual ocean views to elegant dinners
• Two 18-hole golf courses & tennis/racquet facilities
• Boutiques and al fresco shopping

The Breakers has hosted famous guests and events over the years — Sofia Vergara & Joe Manganiello had their wedding here.

Just outside its gates you can:
• Walk historic Worth Avenue 
• Visit the Flagler Museum 
• Stroll Lake Trail 

This isn’t just a hotel — it’s a Florida classic, a piece of history, and one day soon… my staycation. 👑🌴
